utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all these 5 items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and complete.

The 'adventure_travel_addon' matches 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 6) already identified. 'wildlife_conservation_addon' is not in the ground-truth list, so it is excluded. Thus, the items mapped to ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical_health) - 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental_health) - 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) - 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) - 7, Adventure Travel Coverage - 6, Concierge Services - 8, 24/7 Travel Assistance - 10.
